authSecret.name:
AuthSecret holds a secret selector that contains a bearer token for authentication
+optional

maxPayloadSize.name:
MaxPayloadSize is the maximum webhook payload size that the server will accept.
Requests exceeding that limit will be rejected with "request too large" response.
Default value: 1048576 (1MB).
+optional

metadata.name:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

method.name:
Method is HTTP request method that indicates the desired action to be performed for a given resource.
See RFC7231 Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP/1.1): Semantics and Content

port.description: Port on which HTTP server is listening for incoming events.

serverCertSecret.description: ServerCertPath refers the file that contains the cert.

serverKeySecret.name: ServerKeyPath refers the file that contains private key

url.description: URL is the url of the server.
